Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
    Class
    Description
    Bson
    Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by BsonSerializer and BsonParser.
    BsonAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BsonApply
    Dynamically applies a @Bson annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    BsonApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BsonBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the BSON serializers and parsers pulled from the @Bson annotation on the bean property.
    BsonClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the BSON serializers and parsers pulled from the @Bson annotation on the class.
    BsonConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in BsonSerializer and BsonParser.
    BsonDecimal128
    IEEE 754-2008 Decimal128 BID (Binary Integer Decimal) encoding for BSON.
    BsonMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to BsonClassMeta and BsonBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    BsonOutputStream
    Specialized output stream for serializing BSON (Binary JSON) streams.
    BsonParser
    Parses BSON (Binary JSON) into POJO models.
    BsonParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    BsonParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of BsonParser.
    BsonParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    BsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to BSON (Binary JSON).
    BsonSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    BsonSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of BsonSerializer.
    BsonSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    DataType
    BSON element type codes per the BSON Specification 1.1.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
    Class
    Description
    BsonParser
    Parses BSON (Binary JSON) into POJO models.
    BsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to BSON (Binary JSON).
